nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: Loria's satinbird
nodes.summary: Loria's satinbird（Loria's satinbird，学名 Cnemophilus loriae），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于新幾內亞高地、次生林，常见栖息地包括山地森林，主要威胁包括猎捕压力、森林砍伐。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: 新幾內亞高地
nodes.summary: 新幾內亞高地是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联31种鸟类，包括Chestnut forest rail、Archbold's nightjar、Modest tiger parrot等31种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 猎捕压力
nodes.summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

nodes.name: 次生林
nodes.summary: 次生林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联749种鸟类，包括孤䳍、Sickle-winged guan、黑額鳴冠雉等749种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in the New Guinea Highlands

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It inhabits montane forest, forest edge, and secondary growth between about 4,920 and 9,840 ft elevation, though it is most commonly encountered between approximately 6,560 and 7,870 ft. The species forages throughout multiple forest strata but appears to spend much of its time in the lower and middle levels of the forest

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It inhabits montane forest, forest edge, and secondary growth between about 4,920 and 9,840 ft elevation, though it is most commonly encountered between approximately 6,560 and 7,870 ft. The species forages throughout multiple forest strata but appears to spend much of its time in the lower and middle levels of the forest

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Historically, some reports suggested localized declines due to hunting for the plume trade, though later authors considered this unlikely and noted no confirmed records of the species being widely used as ornamentation. The species currently faces no major known large-scale threats beyond localized habitat clearance associated with logging and agriculture
